title: Galaxy Chance
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Galaxy Chance''''', a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]], was a mobile [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] base and casino, similar to [[Booster Terrik]]'s [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Errant Venture/Legends|Errant Venture]]'', but on a much smaller scale. It was owned and operated by a rival of Terrik, who, as a taunt to him, had painted the ''Galaxy Chance'' in the same bright red that Terrik desired for the ''Errant Venture''.

In [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], the [[Khuiumin Survivors]] raided the ''Galaxy Chance'' to abduct one of its passengers, [[Zlece Oonaar]], who had commanded the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Crusader (Victory-class)|''Crusader'']] during the [[Battle of Khuiumin]]. At the time, the ''Galaxy Chance'' was escorted by six [[TYE-wing]] [[Ugly/Legends|uglies]].

{{Ship-stub}}
